root_cause.text: Unintended access to the special `class` property (common to all Java objects) via BeanUtils introspection allows attackers to access the class loader, posing a security risk.
root_cause.evidence: The patch adds `SuppressPropertiesBeanIntrospector.SUPPRESS_CLASS` to explicitly suppress the "class" property, with comments stating that "Unintended access to the property {@code class} ... can be a security risk because it also allows access to the class loader." The test case is titled "Class loader vulnerability in DefaultResolver".

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: Unintended access to the special `class` property (common to all Java objects) via BeanUtils introspection allows attackers to access the class loader, posing a security risk.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch adds `SuppressPropertiesBeanIntrospector.SUPPRESS_CLASS` to explicitly suppress the "class" property, with comments stating that "Unintended access to the property {@code class} ... can be a security risk because it also allows access to the class loader." The test case is titled "Class loader vulnerability in DefaultResolver".

intent_record.intent_summary: Add a pre-configured bean introspector instance to easily suppress the potentially unsafe 'class' property.
intent_record.what: Added a public static final instance SUPPRESS_CLASS to the SuppressPropertiesBeanIntrospector class, initialized with a singleton set containing the string 'class'.
intent_record.how: Provides a pre-configured introspector instance that prevents access to the 'class' property of Java beans, mitigating security risks associated with class loader manipulation.

intent_record.intent_summary: Add a test case to verify the suppression of the 'class' property to prevent a class loader vulnerability.
intent_record.what: Added a new test case Jira463TestCase.java to verify the suppression of the 'class' property.
intent_record.how: The test ensures that adding SuppressPropertiesBeanIntrospector.SUPPRESS_CLASS to the BeanUtilsBean correctly prevents access to the 'class' property by throwing a NoSuchMethodException.

grouping_result.intent: Add a pre-configured bean introspector instance to easily suppress the potentially unsafe 'class' property.
Add a test case to verify the suppression of the 'class' property to prevent a class loader vulnerability.

relevance_review.reason: The group directly introduces a mechanism to suppress the unsafe 'class' property, which is the exact root cause of the vulnerability.
The group adds a test case specifically targeting the suppression of the 'class' property to prevent the class loader vulnerability described in the root cause.
